q: __________ is knocking at the door? – It’s my neighbor.
__________ did you buy at the store? – I bought some bread.
__________ bus should we take, number 3 or number 5? – Number 5.
__________ did the class start today? – At 9 a.m.
__________ did she stay home yesterday? – Because she was sick.
__________ is your classroom? – On the second floor.
__________ did you solve the problem? – With my friend’s help.
__________ made this cake? – My mom did.
__________ is your favorite subject? – Science.
__________ movie do you like more, this one or that one? – This one.
__________ will the trip begin? – Next Monday.
__________ did he run so fast? – Because he was late.
__________ do you usually study after school? – At the library.
__________ did you get to school today? – By bike.
__________ is sitting next to you? – My best friend.
__________ do you want for your birthday? – A new watch.
__________ color do you like better, red or blue? – Blue.
__________ did the movie end? – Around 10 p.m.
__________ did she choose that dress? – Because it was cheap.
__________ is the meeting held? – In the teacher’s office.
__________ did you learn English so well? – By practicing every day.
__________ knows the answer? – Tom does.
__________ is in the box? – Some old photos.
__________ student won the prize, Tom or Alex? – Alex.
__________ do we celebrate Christmas? – In December.
__________ did you skip breakfast? – Because I woke up late.
__________ do you keep your books? – On the shelf.
__________ did the accident happen? – Near the school gate.
__________ did you finish the work so quickly? – By working together.
